name: Validate Max Book Issue Limit
script: frappe.ui.form.on('Book Issue', { before\_save: async function(frm) { if (!frm.doc.library\_member) return; let member = await frappe.db.get\_value( 'Library Member', frm.doc.library\_member, ['max\_books\_allowed', 'member\_name'] ); let max\_books = member.message.max\_books\_allowed || 0; let member\_name = member.message.member\_name; if (max\_books === 0) return; let active\_issues = await frappe.db.count('Book Issue', { filters: { 'library\_member': frm.doc.library\_member, 'issue\_status': ['in', ['Issued', 'Overdue']], 'name': ['!=', frm.doc.name] } }); if (active\_issues >= max\_books) { frappe.throw( '**' + member\_name + '** has already issued **' + active\_issues + ' book(s)**., ' + 'Maximum allowed is **' + max\_books + '**., , ' + 'Please return a book before issuing a new one.' ); } } });
